watsonx-ai.__comment__: IBM watsonx.ai MCP Server. Replace TODO values before use.
watsonx-ai.__command_help__: On Mac with uv installed via brew: /opt/homebrew/bin/uv. Run 'which uv' to find path.
args: __args_help__: clone https://github.com/IBM/watsonx-ai-mcp-server then point --directory at the repo root

env.__env_help__: Copy values from IBM Cloud -> watsonx.ai -> Manage -> Projects -> your project -> Credentials

watsonx-ai.__autoApprove_help__: Remove autoApprove list to require manual approval for every Granite call (recommended for production use)
